---
title: "Research"
description: "Publications by Brett R. Bessen on democratic backsliding, public opinion, executive aggrandizement, and migration in comparative perspective, with a focus on Mexico and Latin America."
---

## Publications

**Restoring institutional confidence in backsliding democracies: Evidence from Mexico**
(with Susan Stokes & Andrés Uribe) — *PNAS*, 2025
[[Paper](https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2516520122)] [[Supplemental](https://www.pnas.org/doi/suppl/10.1073/pnas.2516520122/suppl_file/pnas.2516520122.sapp.pdf)] [[Replication](https://dataverse.harvard.edu/dataset.xhtml?persistentId=doi:10.7910/DVN/HOJD6F)]

**Stereotypes and scandals: Politician gender and public judgments about scandal in Mexico**
(with Fernanda Quintanilla Domínguez & Rebecca Bell-Martin) — *Research & Politics*, 2025
[[Paper](https://doi.org/10.1177/20531680251409456)] [[Supplemental](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/suppl/10.1177/20531680251409456/suppl_file/sj-pdf-1-rap-10.1177_20531680251409456.pdf)] [[Replication](https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/EQI4MB)]

**Populist Discourse and Public Support for Executive Aggrandizement in Latin America**
*Comparative Political Studies*, 2024
[[Paper](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/full/10.1177/00104140231223738)] [[Supplemental](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/suppl/10.1177/00104140231223738/suppl_file/sj-pdf-1-cps-10.1177_00104140231223738.pdf)] [[Replication](https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/NN3DMP)]

**Fairweather Cosmopolitans: Immigration Attitudes in Latin America During the Migrant Crisis**
(with Brendan Connell & Ken Stallman) — *Latin American Politics and Society*, 2024
[[Paper](https://doi.org/10.1017/lap.2024.35)] [[Supplemental](https://static.cambridge.org/content/id/urn%3Acambridge.org%3Aid%3Aarticle%3AS1531426X24000359/resource/name/S1531426X24000359sup001.pdf)] [[Replication](https://dataverse.harvard.edu/dataset.xhtml?persistentId=doi:10.7910/DVN/MQMOTU)]

**Another day, another currency: self-interest, experience, and attitudes toward dollarization in Ecuador**
(with Brendan Connell) — *Political Behavior*, 2024
[[Paper](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11109-022-09840-z)] [[Supplemental](https://static-content.springer.com/esm/art%3A10.1007%2Fs11109-022-09840-z/MediaObjects/11109_2022_9840_MOESM1_ESM.pdf)] [[Replication](https://dataverse.harvard.edu/dataset.xhtml?persistentId=doi:10.7910/DVN/E2JO5N)]

**Rejecting representation? Party systems and popular support for referendums in Europe**
*Electoral Studies*, 2020
[[Paper](files/Bessen - Rejecting Representation - 2020.pdf)] [[Supplemental](files/Rejecting Representation - Supplemental Materials.pdf)]
